zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Williamson於大約1512年出生在英國波藍德時，她的父親John Williamson De Penlin , Sir13歲，母親Isabel Thirkeld34歲。她和Robert Braithwaite至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1606年6月24日在英國維斯特莫藍德包--文德莫享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Williamson于大约1512年出生在英国波藍德时，她的父亲John Williamson De Penlin , Sir13岁，母亲Isabel Thirkeld34岁。她和Robert Braithwaite至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1606年6月24日在英国維斯特莫藍德包--文德莫享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Williamson was born about 1512, in Cumberland, England, her father, John Williamson De Penlin , Sir, was 13 and her mother, Isabel Thirkeld, was 34. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Robert Braithwaite. She died on 24 June 1606, in Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Williamson est née environ 1512, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, John Williamson De Penlin , Sir, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Isabel Thirkeld, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Robert Braithwaite. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1606, à Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Williamson um 1512 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Williamson De Penlin , Sir 13 und ihre Mutter Isabel Thirkeld 34. Sie hatte mit Robert Braithwaite mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Juni 1606 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Williamson è nata il circa 1512 nel Cumberland, England, sua padre, John Williamson De Penlin , Sir, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Isabel Thirkeld, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Robert Braithwaite. Morì il 24 giugno 1606, nel Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Williamsonが約1512年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父John Williamson De Penlin , Sirは13歳，母Isabel Thirkeldは34歳であった。彼女はRobert Braithwaiteとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1606年6月24日にイギリスウエストモーランドボウネス-オン-ウィンデルメアで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Williamson(이)가 대략 1512년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Williamson De Penlin , Sir(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Thirkeld(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Robert Braithwaite(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 6월 24일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 보운스--윈더머에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Williamson nasceu aproximadamente 1512, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Williamson De Penlin , Sir, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Thirkeld, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Robert Braithwaite. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1606, em Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Williamson родилась около 1512 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John Williamson De Penlin , Sir было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Thirkeld, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Robert Braithwaite. Она умерла 24 июня 1606 г. в местности боунесс-он-виндирмир, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Williamson nació aproximadamente 1512, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John Williamson De Penlin , Sir, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Isabel Thirkeld, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Robert Braithwaite. Murió el 24 de junio de 1606, en Bowness-on-Windermere, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
